# CV Solucion — Cabinet Vision Consulting & Support

## Summary
CV Solucion provides Cabinet Vision consulting, troubleshooting, installation, backup/restore assistance, library/material/hardware setup, and CNC output support for cabinet manufacturing businesses.

## Primary audience
Cabinet shops, factories, and designers using Cabinet Vision who need faster troubleshooting, stable production systems, and reliable CNC outputs.

## Services
- Annual Support Plan (priority support, ongoing maintenance, proactive fixes)
- Cabinet Vision installation & setup
- Backup / restore and safe migration (minimize downtime)
- Libraries / materials / hardware configuration
- CNC post-processor & output troubleshooting
- Workflow and production optimization

## Contact
- Email: contact@cvsolucion.com
- WhatsApp: +1 514 963 8719 (https://wa.me/15149638719)

## Key pages

- Privacy Policy: https://cvsolucion.com/#privacy

## Notes
- This website is a single-page application (SPA). Important content is available on the homepage.
